summary: Verified all 3 reported UI issues on VenuLoQ landing page (mobile viewport 390x844). ISSUE 1: Hero heading 'We Negotiate. You Celebrate.' is fully visible at y=72px, not cut off by header/safe area - FIXED. ISSUE 2: Concierge service boxes have h-full class applied (24 elements found), boxes appear symmetrical in 2-column grid - FIXED. ISSUE 3: Compare button opens modal overlay (URL stays at /venues/search, not navigating to /venues/compare), X close button works - FIXED. All landing page elements render correctly.

issue_1_hero_heading_visibility.detail: Hero headline 'We Negotiate. You Celebrate.' positioned at y=72px (height=78px), fully visible above safe-area-inset-top + 48px padding. LandingPage.js line 691 uses calc(env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px) + 48px)

issue_2_concierge_boxes_equal_height.detail: Found 24 elements with h-full class in concierge section. Boxes in 2-column grid appear symmetrical. LandingPage.js line 993-994 applies h-full to both Reveal wrapper and inner div

issue_3_compare_modal_popup.detail: Compare button opens modal overlay (data-testid='compare-sheet-overlay'), URL stays at /venues/search (not navigating to /venues/compare). X close button dismisses modal and returns to search page

landing_page_mobile_header.detail: Mobile header with data-testid='mobile-header' renders correctly with VenuLoQ logo, Sign In button, and hamburger menu

landing_page_hero_section.detail: Hero section with background images, headline, and subtext renders correctly

landing_page_search_card.detail: Search card with City/Near Me toggle, city dropdown, and 'Find My Perfect Venue' CTA renders correctly

landing_page_venue_carousel.detail: Venue showcase carousel with data-testid='venue-showcase' displays curated venues

landing_page_trust_badges.detail: Trust badges section with Verified Venues, Transparent Pricing, Smart Comparison, Booking Assistance

landing_page_venue_categories.detail: Venue categories grid with Hotels, Banquet Halls, Farmhouses, etc.

landing_page_featured_venues.detail: Featured venues section with venue cards showing images, ratings, pricing

landing_page_how_it_works.detail: How it works section with 3 steps

landing_page_concierge_section.detail: Concierge section with 12 service boxes in dark theme

compare_floating_bar.detail: Floating compare bar appears at bottom when venues added, shows venue chips and Compare (X) button

compare_modal_venue_cards.detail: Compare modal shows venue cards with images, ratings, X remove buttons

compare_modal_comparison_table.detail: Comparison table shows Price/Plate, Non-Veg/Plate, Capacity, Type, Setting, Min Spend, and Amenities

compare_modal_close_button.detail: X close button in modal header dismisses modal and returns to search page

critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.js line 691 correctly uses calc(env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px) + 48px) for iPhone notch safe area
LandingPage.js line 993-994 applies h-full to Reveal wrapper and inner div for CSS grid equal height
VenueSearchPage.js uses CompareSheet component (data-testid='compare-sheet-overlay') for compare modal, not CompareFloatingBar's inline CompareModal
CompareFloatingBar.js has inline CompareModal with data-testid='compare-modal' but VenueSearchPage has its own implementation using CompareSheet
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported issues verified as FIXED: (1) Hero heading visible on mobile with safe-area-inset-top padding, (2) Concierge boxes have h-full for equal heights, (3) Compare opens as modal overlay not full page navigation. Note: VenueSearchPage.js has its own compare implementation using CompareSheet component, separate from CompareFloatingBar's inline CompareModal. Both work correctly as modal overlays.
